revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Cs1]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Cs1]]: importing template
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3062240]])
Text replacement - "(?s)(\{\{Draft categories\|.*?\}\})" to "<noinclude>\n$1\n</noinclude>"
revision.text:
[[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]]<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] }}\n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|" to "{{draft categories|"
revision.text:
[[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]]<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n{{draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] }}\n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
revision.text:
[[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]]<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] }}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Protected "[[Template:Cs1]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: [[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]]<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
